repo_prior_art.cite: pid_mediation_proxy_v1 is a distinct failed proxy-null bridge-fiber proposal.

published_prior_art.cite: tian_pearl_2000_probabilities_causation gives sharp general PN bounds, while dawid_murtas_musio_2014_bounding_pc_mediation uses complete-mediator information under no confounding.

repo_prior_art.cite: No catalogue entry gives sharp PN intervals obtained by deleting mediator-defier types while retaining arbitrary mediator-outcome response dependence.

published_prior_art.cite: murtas_dawid_musio_2017_new_bounds_pc_mediation and dawid_humphreys_musio_2024_bound_causes_effects_mediators study mediator-informed PC bounds under stronger process structure.

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_ordinal_principal_strata_v1 and pid_late_bounded_defiers_one_sided_compliance concern different principal-strata/defier problems and do not contain a PN mediator-defier endpoint-face frontier.

published_prior_art.cite: xie_li_2026_partial_causal_diagrams gives a mediator/back-door constrained PoC optimization program, but not an observable strictness characterization for deleting mediator-defier types under arbitrary M-Y response dependence.

repo_prior_art.cite: No catalogue entry supplies tie-aware inference for the joint sign-free/mediator-monotone PN endpoint and support-slack map.

published_prior_art.cite: fang_santos_2019_directionally_differentiable gives the generic modified-bootstrap route and zhang_wang_miao_2025_causal_attribution_confidence gives close PN-bound inference without this mediator-envelope map.

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question oeq:canonical-defier-threshold / Xie and Li (2026) comparison
novelty_flags.one_line: The proposal attributes Theorem 3.3's mediator conditional-independence constraints to Xie and Li equations (14)-(15), but their mediator theorem encodes them in equations (27)-(28); equation (14) is part of the Tian-Pearl baseline discussion.

soundness_flags.label: Open-ended Question oeq:canonical-defier-threshold
soundness_flags.one_line: With S^- and S^+ defined as minimum defier mass on the sign-free endpoint-optimal faces and Q_1 defined by zero defier mass, the stated iff is the routine compact-LP fact that an endpoint face intersects Q_1; this is a 1-2-step reduction and caps the flagship framing at field.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Theorem thm:pn-endpoint-limit
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The T-coordinate limit and tie-aware bootstrap conclusion assume that oeq:canonical-defier-threshold supplies the asserted finite piecewise-affine, directionally differentiable representation of T.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Conditional on that derived representation, the five-coordinate plug-in map has the stated directional-delta and modified-bootstrap inference route.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Correct the Xie and Li location anchor to Theorem 3.3 and equations (27)-(28), then state precisely that its back-door conditional-independence program is nonlinear/nonconvex whereas the proposed randomized response-type polytope is finite and linear.

Replace the generic support-slack equivalence as the headline contribution with an explicit irredundant observable cell/facet characterization that cannot be recovered merely by checking whether an endpoint face intersects Q_1.

Commit a nondegenerate binary worked law with both endpoint-optimal couplings, positive S^- and S^+, and a directly verified relatively open neighborhood to establish that the claimed strictness regime is not only an LP identity.

recommended_next_step: Revise the Xie-and-Li comparison and sharpen the endpoint-face LP identity into a substantive observable facet/frontier result before re-reviewing at the field tier.
